title: Timeline Filter for Overdue Items at Dashboard Level
excerpt: I would like to request the addition of a timeline filter at the dashboard level that allows users to filter for ‘overdue’ items across all boards. Currently, while the timeline column is very helpful for tracking projec…

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to request the addition of a timeline filter at the dashboard level that allows users to filter for ‘overdue’ items across all boards. Currently, while the timeline column is very helpful for tracking project timelines, having the ability to quickly view overdue items from a dashboard perspective would significantly enhance our ability to manage tasks and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

My aim is to have multiple projects connected to a dashboard and easily see items that are “current” as well as items that are “overdue.”
